positive: A whimsical forest creature made of bioluminescent flora and delicate moss, standing atop a giant, smooth polished river stone. The creature has elegant, flowing contours and gentle symmetry, reminiscent of woodland spirits. The background is a minimalist, softly diffused depiction of a twilight forest canopy, focusing all attention on the central subject. Use strong, vibrant bioluminescent glow effects—electric blues, emerald greens, and ethereal purples—for the internal light sources. Composition should be a detailed, isolated silhouette on a slightly textured, muted background. Style: Detailed vector art meets ethereal stained glass illustration, high contrast, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Clean lines, central focus, magical realism, detailed textures, 8k, cinematic lighting, high resolution, solid color blocking potential.
negative: blurry, noise, grain, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly rendered, low contrast, grayscale, monochrome, deep shadows, dirty, cluttered, messy, writing
